parsed.production_notes: The video is entirely AI-generated, evidenced by the photorealistic skeleton protagonist, which is a hallmark of AI video generation. Background characters exhibit uncanny, slightly distorted facial features and unnatural movements. The lighting, textures, and overall visual style have a characteristic AI-generated smoothness and slight inconsistency between shots.

characters.appearance: A full human skeleton with no skin or flesh. The bone structure is realistic and detailed. It has no facial expressions but uses body language to convey emotion.
characters.wardrobe: Initially wears a brown zip-up hoodie over a grey t-shirt, blue jeans, and grey sneakers. Later changes to just a grey t-shirt, blue jeans, and grey sneakers.
characters.demeanor: Transitions from anxious and despairing to confident and relaxed.

characters.appearance: Caucasian male, middle-aged, short dark hair, clean-shaven. Average build.
characters.wardrobe: Dark blue police uniform, including a short-sleeved shirt with patches, dark trousers, a peaked police cap, and a duty belt.
characters.demeanor: Initially stern and official, later friendly and welcoming.

characters.appearance: Caucasian female, young adult, dark hair pulled back into a bun or ponytail. Average build.
characters.wardrobe: Dark blue police uniform, short-sleeved shirt with patches, dark trousers.

scenes.setting: Modern airport terminal, daytime, bright natural lighting, large windows.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A, a human skeleton wearing a brown zip-up hoodie over a grey t-shirt, blue jeans, and grey sneakers, walks forward through a bright, modern airport terminal. The skeleton is pulling a silver rolling suitcase with its right hand. Other travelers, including men and women in casual and business attire, walk in the background. A police officer in a blue uniform stands observing the crowd. The terminal features large glass windows on the left, revealing airplanes parked on the tarmac outside. The lighting is bright and natural, casting soft shadows on the polished floor.

scenes.visual_description: A skeleton dressed in casual clothing walks through a busy airport terminal, pulling a suitcase. Text overlays appear in the center of the screen, highlighting the premise of the video.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: क्या हो अगर आपको 7 दिन के लिए यूएसए में रहना पड़े? [What if you had to live in the USA for 7 days?]
scenes.on_screen_text: KYA HO AGAR 7 DIN KE LIYE USA MEIN REHNA PADE

scenes.setting: Front porch of a suburban house, daytime, clear weather.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A, wearing a brown hoodie and blue jeans, stands on the front porch of a suburban house. The skeleton faces Character B, a male police officer standing on the porch. Character B wears a dark blue uniform, a peaked cap, and holds a clipboard and pen in his hands. The officer looks directly at the skeleton. The front door of the house is open, revealing a glimpse of the interior. A large white paper notice is posted on the exterior wall next to the door.

scenes.visual_description: The skeleton stands at the open door of a house, being confronted by a police officer holding a clipboard. A large official notice is visible on the wall next to the door. Text overlays appear on screen.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: पहले ही दिन नोटिस आ जाएगा कि अगर आपको इंग्लिश नहीं आती, तो आपको यूएसए छोड़ना पड़ेगा। [On the very first day, a notice will come that if you don't know English, you will have to leave the USA.]
scenes.on_screen_text: PEHLE HI DIN NOTICE AA JAYEGA KI AGAR AAPKO ENGLISH NAHI AATI TOH AAPKO USA CHHODNA PADEGA. OFFICIAL NOTICE ENGLISH REQUIRED

scenes.setting: City street at dusk, streetlights illuminated, brick buildings.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A, wearing a brown hoodie and blue jeans, sits on a wooden bench on a city sidewalk. Initially, the skeleton has its bony hands covering its face in a gesture of despair. It then lowers its hands and looks down at a smartphone it is holding. The street behind the skeleton is lined with brick buildings and illuminated by warm streetlamps. Pedestrians walk by in the blurred background, creating a sense of urban activity. The scene is set at dusk, with a mix of natural and artificial light.

scenes.visual_description: The skeleton sits on a city bench, initially looking distressed with its hands over its face. It then looks at a smartphone. Text overlays and an app logo appear on screen.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: आप घबरा जाते हो। तभी आपको याद आता है MySivi ऐप। आप तुरंत स्मार्टफोन से MySivi डाउनलोड करते हो और एआई टीचर के साथ रोज़ प्रैक्टिस शुरू करते हो। [You get scared. Then you remember the MySivi app. You immediately download MySivi on your smartphone and start practicing daily with the AI teacher.]
scenes.on_screen_text: AAP GHABRA JAATE HO TABHI AAPKO YAAD AATA HAI MySivi APP AAP TURANT SMARTPHONE SE MYSIVI DOWNLOAD KARTE HO AUR AI TEACHER KE SAATH ROZ PRACTICE SHURU KARTE HO

scenes.setting: Modern apartment interior, daytime, large floor-to-ceiling windows.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A, wearing a brown hoodie and blue jeans, sits on the sill of a large floor-to-ceiling window in a modern apartment. The skeleton holds a smartphone up to its face, appearing to speak into the device. The apartment interior is visible in the background, featuring a potted plant, a wooden TV stand, and a grey sofa. The room is well-lit with natural daylight streaming in through the large windows. The skeleton's posture suggests focused engagement with the phone.

scenes.visual_description: The skeleton sits by a large window in an apartment, holding a phone and practicing English. An app interface overlay appears, showing a chat conversation with corrections. Text overlays also appear.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: वो आपकी हर गलती इंस्टेंटली करेक्ट करता है, बिना जजमेंट के। और धीरे-धीरे आपकी इंग्लिश फ्लूएंट होने लगती है। [It instantly corrects your every mistake, without judgment. And slowly your English starts becoming fluent.]
scenes.on_screen_text: WO AAPKI HAR GALTI INSTANTLY CORRECT KARTA HAI BINA JUDGEMENT KE AUR DHEERE-DHEERE AAPKI ENGLISH FLUENT HONE LAGTI HAI

scenes.setting: Front porch of a suburban house, daytime, clear weather.

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A, now wearing a grey t-shirt and blue jeans, stands at the open front door of a house. It gestures with its bony hands while interacting with Character B and Character C, who are standing on the porch. Character B is a male officer holding a clipboard, and Character C is a female officer holding a pen and paper. Both officers wear dark blue uniforms and smile warmly at the skeleton. Character B extends his right hand, and the skeleton shakes it. The scene is bright and cheerful, set during the daytime.

scenes.visual_description: The skeleton, now wearing a grey t-shirt, stands at the door talking confidently to two smiling police officers. The male officer shakes the skeleton's hand. Text overlays appear on screen.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: 7 दिन बाद पुलिस वेरिफिकेशन के लिए आती है। आप उनसे कॉन्फिडेंटली इंग्लिश में बात करते हो। आपकी इंग्लिश सुनकर वो मुस्कुराते हैं और कहते हैं - "Your English is impressive. Welcome to America." [After 7 days, the police come for verification. You talk to them confidently in English. Hearing your English, they smile and say - "Your English is impressive. Welcome to America."]
scenes.on_screen_text: 7 DIN BAAD POLICE VERIFICATION KE LIYE AATI HAI AAP UNSE CONFIDENTLY ENGLISH MEIN BAAT KARTE HO AAPKI ENGLISH SUNKAR WO MUSKURATE HAIN AUR KEHTE HAIN - "YOUR ENGLISH IS IMPRESSIVE. WELCOME TO AMERICA."

panels.panel_visual_description: Character A, wearing a grey t-shirt and blue jeans, walks confidently down a busy city street. The skeleton is looking down at a smartphone held in its hand. Yellow taxis and other vehicles are visible on the street in the background. Pedestrians walk on the sidewalk, going about their day. The buildings lining the street are tall and urban, typical of a large city. The lighting suggests a bright, sunny day.

scenes.visual_description: The skeleton walks down a city street looking at its phone. An app download overlay appears at the bottom of the screen, along with text overlays.
scenes.audio_transcript: Unknown speaker says: अगर आपको भी फ्लूएंटली इंग्लिश बोलनी है, तो MySivi ऐप अभी डाउनलोड करो। [If you also want to speak English fluently, download the MySivi app now.]
scenes.on_screen_text: AGAR AAPKO BHI FLUENTLY ENGLISH BOLNI HAI TOH MYSIVI APP ABHI DOWNLOAD KARO
